excluded: completed calibration or matched packet execution
supported: a no-submission hardware execution configuration preflight for the Stage 105 rerun protocol
provider-level readiness/blocker reporting without recording secret values

objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
